scenarios.status_note: covers one-way pruning query safety: pruned-boundary Ok rejection, retained Pruned rejection, Ok requires retained observation, canonical flags, and Ok/Pruned mutual exclusion
scenarios.rationale:
`(boundary_present, block_number, pruned_before, retained, returned_ok, returned_pruned)`

**true 候補**

```rust
// 境界なし: pruning 判定不能、pruned 返却なし
(0, 10, 10, 0, 0, 0)
(0, 10, 10, 1, 0, 0)
(0, 10, 10, 1, 1, 0)

// 境界あり、block は未 prune 側
(1, 11, 10, 0, 0, 0)
(1, 11, 10, 1, 0, 0)
(1, 11, 10, 1, 1, 0)

// 境界あり、block は prune 済み側
(1, 10, 10, 0, 0, 0)
(1, 10, 10, 0, 0, 1)
(1, 10, 10, 1, 0, 0)

// block_number < pruned_before も <= 側として確認
(1, 9, 10, 0, 0, 1)
```

**false 候補**

```rust
// boolean 扱いの引数が 1 超過
(2, 10, 10, 0, 0, 0)
(0, 10, 10, 2, 0, 0)
(0, 10, 10, 0, 2, 0)
(0, 10, 10, 0, 0, 2)

// returned_ok なのに retained なし
(0, 10, 10, 0, 1, 0)

// boundary あり、prune 済み側なのに ok
(1, 10, 10, 1, 1, 0)

// retained と returned_pruned が同時成立
(1, 10, 10, 1, 0, 1)

// ok と pruned が同時成立
(1, 10, 10, 0, 1, 1)

// pruned 返却なのに boundary なし
(0, 10, 10, 0, 0, 1)

// pruned 返却なのに block が未 prune 側
(1, 11, 10, 0, 0, 1)
```
